matcher.coveragePreview: surface areas and volumes: 3-d shapes grade 9 mathematics students cube surface area & volume cuboid surface area & volume right circular cylinder right circular cone sphere and hemisphere surface areas and volumes: 3-d shapes introduction to session topic mastering formulas for common shapes cube, cuboid, cylinder, cone, sphere real-world applications from 2d to 3d: quick recall perimeter and area of 2d shapes 2d: perimeter = boundary length, area = space inside 3d surface area = sum of areas of all faces volume = capacity or space occupied the cube and the cuboid cube surface area & volume cuboid surface area & volume [object object] [object object] formulas for tsa and volume the right circular cylinder cylinder surface area & volume radius = r, height = h curved surface area (csa) = 2πrh total surface area (tsa) = 2πr(r + h) volume = πr²h cones and spheres cone surface area & volume sphere surface area & volume cone: radius r, height h, slant l (l² = r² + h²) - csa = πrl - tsa = πr(r+l) - vol = 1/3πr²h sphere: - surface area = 4πr² - volume = 4/3πr³ example: calculating volume volume calculation steps problem: find volume of cylinder - radius (r) = 7 cm, height (h) = 10 cm s...
